title: Ma`ai #4597
definition:
Maai = "compassionate"

 1) one of the sons of Asaph who took part in the musical service at
    the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Maai = "compassionate"

 1) one of the sons of Asaph who took part in the musical service at
    the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem

    NASB:  an Isr. musician
